title: SCI Statistical Yearbook agriculture chapter tables, individually mirrored by Iran Data Portal (Syracuse University)
source_org: Statistical Centre of Iran (SCI); underlying primary data attributed to Ministry of (Jihad-e-)Agriculture. Mirrored by Iran Data Portal, Syracuse University.

files.name: Wheat-Production.xlsx
files.notes: Wheat production (tons), Iranian year 1356-1392 (1977/78-2013/14), 37 annual points. Source cited in-file: 'Ministry of Agriculture'. Longest single-crop time series found in this hunt.

files.name: 25-production-meat-milk.xlsx
files.notes: Production of red meat and milk (1000 tons), national total for 1370,1375,1380-1385 (1991,1996,2001-2006) plus a by-province breakdown for 1385. Source: Centre for Rural Researches and Agricultural Economy / Ministry of Jihad-e-Agriculture.

files.name: 29-chicken-meat-egg.xlsx
files.notes: Production of chicken meat and egg (1000 tons), same 8-point national-total year set as file 25, plus by-province breakdown. Source: Ministry of Jihad-e-Agriculture.

files.name: 28-livestock.xlsx
files.notes: Number and weight of livestock slaughtered at authorized slaughterhouses (1000 carcasses, 1000 tons) by species (sheep, goats, cattle, buffaloes, camels), same 8-point year set. Source: Statistical Centre of Iran.

files.name: 17-purchase-price.xlsx
files.notes: Guaranteed purchase price of basic crops (rial/kg), 1375, 1380-1385 (1996, 2001-2006). Producer-price angle, not yet harmonized into the tidy CSV (out of this pass's scope: production/area was prioritized); kept as raw for a future price-angle pass.

files.name: 18-sale-price-annual-crops.xlsx
files.notes: Average rural sale price per kg of wheat, barley, rice, peas, pinto beans, lentils, sugar beet, cotton, tobacco, 1370-1385 (1991-2006), by year and by province. Not yet harmonized (price angle, future pass).

files.name: 19-sale-price-per-crops.xlsx
files.notes: Average rural sale price per kg of apples, apricots, pears, grapes, oranges, dates, pomegranates, pistachios, almonds, walnuts, 1370-1385 (1991-2006). Not yet harmonized (price angle, future pass).

files.name: 20-prod-costs.xlsx
files.notes: Average production costs and farm-gate prices of selected annual crops (irrigated/rainfed wheat & barley etc.), 1374-1384 (1995-2005). Not yet harmonized (price angle, future pass).

time_coverage: 1356-1392 Iranian calendar (1977/78-2013/14 Gregorian), varies by file -- see per-file notes
frequency: annual, irregular sampling in most files (SCI Statistical Yearbook editions were not published every single year)
units: tons / 1000 tons / rial per kg, per file -- see per-file notes
license_terms: Underlying data is Iranian government statistics (SCI/Ministry of Agriculture); Iran Data Portal mirror terms per irandataportal.syr.edu (academic/research use, Syracuse University project)
notes: maj.ir and amar.org.ir were both unreachable directly from this environment (connection refused / geo-block, consistent with prior SOURCES.md notes). Iran Data Portal (Syracuse University) mirrors individual chapter tables extracted from SCI's own Statistical Yearbook, sourced in-file to 'Ministry of Agriculture' / 'Ministry of Jihad-e-Agriculture' / 'Statistical Centre of Iran' -- i.e. this is a primary-source-via-academic-mirror, not a modeled/secondary estimate. Most files here are single-year (2003 census) or short-span (1991-2006) province-level census tables and were left unharmonized for this pass since they cannot support a real multi-year chart per this project's chart rule; only Wheat-Production.xlsx and the two livestock/poultry files (25, 28, 29) had usable multi-point national time series and were harmonized.

failures.error: curl exit/connect timeout after 15s; WebFetch ECONNREFUSED
HTTP 404 -- Wheat-Production.xlsx appears to be the only single-crop long-run file the portal hosts under this naming pattern; no equivalent files found for other crops via guessing or web search
